violations.text: The new hot food line does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
Food observed stored on shelves less than 6 inches from the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

Single service items (styrofoam cups) are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean on a shelf with syrup bottles in the front service area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

Cardboard is used to line shelves in the kitchen storage area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit, counters, shelves, and cupboards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

The wall vent in the front service area is in poor repair, rusted, impacting its ability to be cleaned. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the kitchen. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a pan. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Desserts sold in the establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Staff placed behind the counter. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
Cases of food items were observed stored on the floor under dunnage racks in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

The light shield in kitchen and garbage receptacle in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided guidance at inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized, ice was disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

Desserts sold in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC placed behind the counter. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Several wet wiping cloths observed on counters in service area. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
Single-use items are being reused for food preparation and storage. Single-use items shall not be reused. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

Wood is used as a brace/support for a colander at the 3-bay sink. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and debris: prep unit shelves over prep area in kitchen New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
Light shield in the kitchen has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
